description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow with a flat roof and a sprawling, single-story layout. The structure features multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, with large windows and glass doors that open onto a central courtyard and a backyard pool area. The property is surrounded by lush landscaping, including trees and flowering shrubs, which provide privacy and aesthetic appeal. The main entrance is prominent, flanked by wide windows, and the building includes several outdoor living spaces such as patios and terraces. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, natural light, and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a central courtyard with a pool, surrounded by landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide windows, and landscaped area with trees and flowering shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard pool, central courtyard, and the interconnected rectangular volumes of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the extensive row of trees, the pool area, and the flat roofline.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the lush landscaping, patios, and the open layout of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
